# ImagineArt Help Center

> Help articles, tutorials, and guides for ImagineArt - the AI generation platform.

## Docs

- [AGENTS](https://docs.imagine.art/AGENTS.md)
- [Cancel Subscription](https://docs.imagine.art/account/cancel-subscription.md): How to cancel your ImagineArt subscription and what happens to your credits and access afterward.
- [Delete Account](https://docs.imagine.art/account/delete-account.md): How to submit an ImagineArt account deletion request and what happens to your data.
- [Mobile App](https://docs.imagine.art/account/mobile-app.md): Download and use ImagineArt on iOS and Android to create images and videos from your phone or tablet.
- [Password Recovery](https://docs.imagine.art/account/password-recovery.md): How to recover your ImagineArt account if you forgot your password or can't remember which sign-in method you used.
- [Sign Up and Sign In](https://docs.imagine.art/account/sign-up-sign-in.md): How to create an ImagineArt account and sign in — covering all four authentication methods, troubleshooting, and support contacts.
- [Subscription Plans](https://docs.imagine.art/account/subscription-plans.md): Compare ImagineArt's Free, Basic, Standard, Ultimate, Creator, and Enterprise plans — pricing, credits, features, and billing options.
- [Troubleshooting](https://docs.imagine.art/account/troubleshooting.md): Solutions to common issues with your ImagineArt web account, including login problems, locked models, failed generations, and credit issues.
- [Update Billing](https://docs.imagine.art/account/updating-billing.md): How to update your payment method or billing address on your ImagineArt account.
- [Upgrade or Downgrade](https://docs.imagine.art/account/upgrade-downgrade.md): Change your ImagineArt subscription plan and understand how the transition affects your credits and team seats.
- [AI Copilot](https://docs.imagine.art/ai-copilot.md)
- [Choosing the Right Image Model](https://docs.imagine.art/ai-models/image-models.md): Find the best ImagineArt image model for your project — use case guidance, side-by-side comparisons, and direct links to every model page.
- [Chatgpt image](https://docs.imagine.art/ai-models/image/chatgpt-image.md)
- [Chatgpt image 1 5](https://docs.imagine.art/ai-models/image/chatgpt-image-1-5.md)

- [Z image turbo](https://docs.imagine.art/ai-models/image/z-image-turbo.md)
- [Choosing the Right Video Model](https://docs.imagine.art/ai-models/video-models.md): Find the best ImagineArt video model for your project — use case guidance, side-by-side comparisons, and direct links to all 32 model pages.
- [Google veo 3 1](https://docs.imagine.art/ai-models/video/google-veo-3-1.md)

- [Wan 2 6](https://docs.imagine.art/ai-models/video/wan-2-6.md)
- [AI Resize](https://docs.imagine.art/ai-resize.md)
- [Imagine Apps](https://docs.imagine.art/apps/imagine-apps.md): Specialized AI-powered tools for creating CGI ads, editing images, and generating music — all with just a few clicks and no prior editing experience required.
- [What are Audio Tools](https://docs.imagine.art/audio-tools.md): Generate speech, music, and cloned voices using AI.
- [Combine Text](https://docs.imagine.art/combine-text.md)
- [Combine Videos and Audios](https://docs.imagine.art/combine-videos-and-audios.md)
- [Monetization](https://docs.imagine.art/community/monetization.md): Earn credits every time someone downloads your assets on ImagineArt.
- [Create your Profile](https://docs.imagine.art/community/profile.md): Set up and manage your ImagineArt community profile to showcase your work, grow your audience, and unlock monetization opportunities.
- [Showcase Your Work](https://docs.imagine.art/community/showcase.md): Publish and share your AI-generated images and videos in the ImagineArt community to build your portfolio and grow your audience.
- [Top Creators](https://docs.imagine.art/community/top-creators.md): Learn how ImagineArt selects Top Creators and how to work toward earning the designation.
- [ImagineArt Community](https://docs.imagine.art/community/what-is-community.md): A vibrant ecosystem for creators to showcase, share, and monetize their AI-generated assets.
- [Compositor](https://docs.imagine.art/compositor.md): Combine and layer multiple inputs directly on the Workflows canvas.
- [Edit Image](https://docs.imagine.art/edit-image.md)
- [Edit Video](https://docs.imagine.art/edit-video.md)
- [Extend Video](https://docs.imagine.art/extend-video.md)
- [Extract Video Frame](https://docs.imagine.art/extract-video-frame.md)
- [Account Deletion Request](https://docs.imagine.art/faq/account-deletion.md): How to permanently delete your personal ImagineArt account or a team workspace, and what data is removed.
- [How to Cancel Your Subscription](https://docs.imagine.art/faq/cancel-subscription.md): Step-by-step guide to cancelling your ImagineArt subscription on web or mobile, and what happens after cancellation.
- [Credit Assignment and Usage Policy](https://docs.imagine.art/faq/credit-policy.md): How credits are assigned across subscription plans, the no-rollover policy, and your options when credits run out.
- [Other FAQs](https://docs.imagine.art/faq/other-faqs.md): Answers to common questions about commercial use, content filters, cross-platform accounts, and copyright of AI-generated art.
- [Password Recovery and Sign-in](https://docs.imagine.art/faq/password-recovery.md): How to recover your password, set up email login from a social account, and sign in using any of ImagineArt's four authentication methods.
- [Troubleshooting Your ImagineArt Account](https://docs.imagine.art/faq/troubleshooting.md): Eight steps to resolve common sign-in issues, loading problems, and browser compatibility issues with ImagineArt on the web.
- [Updating Billing Information](https://docs.imagine.art/faq/updating-billing.md): How to update your payment method, download invoices, and manage billing details through ImagineArt's billing portal.
- [Upgrading or Downgrading Your Subscription](https://docs.imagine.art/faq/upgrade-downgrade.md): How to upgrade, downgrade, cancel a scheduled change, or purchase credit top-ups from your ImagineArt subscription dashboard.
- [The Cinematographer's Toolkit](https://docs.imagine.art/film-studio/camera-controls.md): Four dials separate Film Studio from a generic image generator: camera body, lens, focal length, aperture.
- [Creating Images](https://docs.imagine.art/film-studio/create-image.md): Images are the foundation of everything you will do in Film Studio.
- [Creating Videos](https://docs.imagine.art/film-studio/create-video.md): From frames to motion. Single-shot and multi-shot, up to 15 seconds.
- [Editing an Existing Video](https://docs.imagine.art/film-studio/edit-video.md): For when you already have footage and want to redirect it.
- [Extending a Video](https://docs.imagine.art/film-studio/extend-video.md): For when you have a video you love and want more of it.
- [Your First Project](https://docs.imagine.art/film-studio/getting-started.md): Follow this section once and the rest of the guide will make a lot more sense.
- [Glossary](https://docs.imagine.art/film-studio/glossary.md): A quick reference to terms used throughout this guide and inside Film Studio.
- [Pro Tips & Best Practices](https://docs.imagine.art/film-studio/pro-tips.md): Habits that lift your output from 'good generation' to 'good film.'
- [Quick Reference](https://docs.imagine.art/film-studio/quick-reference.md): One-page summary — all the key dials, limits, and disciplines in one place.
- [References](https://docs.imagine.art/film-studio/references.md): Build a persistent library of characters, products, images, videos, and audio for consistent visual continuity across your film.
- [What is Film Studio](https://docs.imagine.art/film-studio/what-is-film-studio.md): A complete production environment for visual storytellers — the controls of a real cinematographer, paired with generative AI.
- [Understanding the Workspace](https://docs.imagine.art/film-studio/workspace.md): Three areas, four core actions, one top bar. Learn this once and every later section gets faster.
- [Generate Audio](https://docs.imagine.art/generate-audio.md)
- [Generate Image](https://docs.imagine.art/generate-image.md)
- [Generate Music](https://docs.imagine.art/generate-music.md)
- [Generate Video](https://docs.imagine.art/generate-video.md)
- [Generate Voice](https://docs.imagine.art/generate-voice.md)
- [Getting Started](https://docs.imagine.art/getting-started.md)
- [Image Iterator](https://docs.imagine.art/image-iterator.md)
- [Camera Angles](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/camera-angles.md)
- [Characters](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/characters.md): Create custom characters and products from reference images and use them consistently across your generations.
- [Color Palettes](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/color-palettes.md): Extract the color scheme from any reference image and apply it to your generations.
- [Create Image](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/create-image.md): Experience the next frontier of AI artistry. Choose from Imagine 1.0, Flux, Seedream 4.0, and more to create stunning visuals from text prompts with unmatched details.
- [Edit Image](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/edit-image.md): With ImagineArt’s Image Edit feature, you can guide the AI to make specific changes to your images using text-based prompts. Powered by the latest AI models.
- [Effects](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/effects.md): Replicate the visual effects from a reference image — lighting, atmosphere, texture overlays, and more.
- [Elements](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/elements.md): Pull specific objects, motifs, or visual elements from a reference image into your generations.
- [Image Credits](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/image-credits.md): Understand how credits are consumed for image generation, editing, personalization, and upscaling.
- [Image Prompt](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/image-prompt.md): Use an existing image as a visual reference to guide AI image generation alongside your text prompt.
- [Quick Actions](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/quick-actions.md)
- [Style](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/styles.md): Use any existing image as a visual blueprint to guide the aesthetic of your generations.
- [Upscale](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/upscale.md)
- [What is Add References](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/what-is-add-references.md): Use reference images to guide your generations — control style, color, characters, objects, effects, and camera perspective.
- [What is Image Studio?](https://docs.imagine.art/image-tools/what-is-image.md)
- [ImagineArt Documentation Home](https://docs.imagine.art/index.md)
- [LipSync](https://docs.imagine.art/lip-sync.md)
- [Motion Transfer](https://docs.imagine.art/motion-transfer.md)
- [Multiple Camera Angles](https://docs.imagine.art/multiple-camera-angles.md)
- [Music](https://docs.imagine.art/music.md): Generate original music tracks from text descriptions using AI.
- [ImagineArt Teams](https://docs.imagine.art/overview/imagineart-teams.md): Share a single subscription and credit pool with your collaborators using ImagineArt Teams.
- [Creating & Joining Teams](https://docs.imagine.art/overview/teams/create-and-join.md): Set up a new team workspace, invite members, and collaborate with comments.
- [Credits & Billing](https://docs.imagine.art/overview/teams/credits.md): How shared credits work, auto top-ups, and setting per-member credit limits.
- [Folder Sharing](https://docs.imagine.art/overview/teams/sharing.md): Grant specific team members access to individual private folders without exposing your entire workspace.
- [Understanding Credits](https://docs.imagine.art/overview/understanding-credits.md): Learn what credits are, how they're consumed, the three types available, and how to manage your balance.
- [What is ImagineArt?](https://docs.imagine.art/overview/what-is-imagineart.md): An overview of ImagineArt, how to create an account, and the core tools available to you.
- [Account Deletion Policy](https://docs.imagine.art/policies/account-deletion-policy.md)
- [Cookie Policy](https://docs.imagine.art/policies/cookie-policy.md)
- [Privacy Policy](https://docs.imagine.art/policies/privacy-policy.md)
- [Refund Policy](https://docs.imagine.art/policies/refund-policy.md)
- [Terms and conditions](https://docs.imagine.art/policies/terms-and-conditions.md)
- [Unlimited Generation Policy](https://docs.imagine.art/policies/unlimited-generation-policy.md)
- [Prompt](https://docs.imagine.art/prompt.md)
- [Quick Actions](https://docs.imagine.art/quick-actions.md)
- [Relight](https://docs.imagine.art/relight.md)
- [Sound Effects](https://docs.imagine.art/sound-effects.md)
- [Split Image](https://docs.imagine.art/split-image.md)
- [Split Text](https://docs.imagine.art/split-text.md)
- [Storyboard](https://docs.imagine.art/storyboard.md)
- [Text iterator](https://docs.imagine.art/text-iterator.md)
- [Text-to-Speech](https://docs.imagine.art/text-to-speech.md): Convert text into natural-sounding speech using AI voice models.
- [Upscale Image](https://docs.imagine.art/upscale-image.md)
- [Upscale Video](https://docs.imagine.art/upscale-video.md)
- [Voice Cloning](https://docs.imagine.art/video-cloning.md): Generate speech in the voice of real people and original characters using AI.
- [Video production brief](https://docs.imagine.art/video-production-brief.md)
- [Edit Video](https://docs.imagine.art/video-tools/edit-video.md): Transform existing videos using natural language commands — remove objects, change environments, adjust lighting, and more without traditional editing software.
- [Elements](https://docs.imagine.art/video-tools/elements.md): Save a character or object as a reusable reference that keeps its appearance consistent across your videos and Workflows.
- [Image to Video](https://docs.imagine.art/video-tools/image-to-video.md): Animate a static image into a video by providing a start frame, or both a start and end frame, and letting the AI generate the motion in between.
- [Lipsync](https://docs.imagine.art/video-tools/lipsync.md): Transform a still image into a talking avatar by syncing facial movements and lip animations to audio or text-to-speech.
- [Motion Control](https://docs.imagine.art/video-tools/motion-control.md): Animate a character image by transferring body motion from a reference video — the AI reads the movements in the clip and applies them to your character.
- [Reference to Video](https://docs.imagine.art/video-tools/reference-to-video.md): Generate entirely new video content by uploading up to four reference images of characters, props, or scenes, and describing the scenario you want to create.
- [Reference Video](https://docs.imagine.art/video-tools/reference-video.md)
- [Text to Video](https://docs.imagine.art/video-tools/text-to-video.md)
- [Video Credits](https://docs.imagine.art/video-tools/video-credits.md): Understand how credits are consumed for video generation, including what factors affect cost and how to check your exact credit total before generating.
- [Video Effects](https://docs.imagine.art/video-tools/video-effects.md)
- [Video Extend](https://docs.imagine.art/video-tools/video-extend.md)
- [What is Video Studio?](https://docs.imagine.art/video-tools/what-is-video.md)
- [Video Trimmer](https://docs.imagine.art/video-trimmer.md)
- [What are Text Nodes](https://docs.imagine.art/what-are-text-nodes.md)
- [Intro to Workflows](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/Intro-to-workflows.md): Build powerful AI pipelines on an infinite visual canvas. Connect 50+ models, organize your workspace, and collaborate with your team.
- [AI Models in Workflows](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/ai-models.md): Browse all image, video, and text AI models available on the Workflows canvas.
- [What is App Builder](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/app-builder.md)
- [App Marketplace](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/app-marketplace.md): Publish apps to the community and earn credits when others use them
- [Canvas Interface](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/canvas-interface.md): Navigate the Workflows canvas, add and connect nodes, organize your workspace, and run your first workflow.
- [Canvas Navigation](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/canvas-navigation.md)
- [Collaboration and Sharing](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/collaboration-and-sharing.md)
- [Core Concept](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/core-concept.md)
- [Create an App](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/create-app.md): Turn your workflow into a simple, shareable app
- [Feedback and Support](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/feedbaack-and-support.md)
- [Keyboard Shortcuts](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/keyboard-shortcuts.md)
- [Manage Your Apps](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/manage-apps.md): Browse, manage, and discover apps
- [Monitor Status](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/monitor-status.md)
- [Organize your Workflow](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/organize-your-workflow.md)
- [Publish Your App](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/publish-app.md): Share your app with your team, the community, or keep it private
- [Run your first Workflow](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/run-your-first-workflow.md)
- [Understanding Nodes](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/understanding-nodes.md): Complete reference for every node type in Workflows—image, video, text, and utility nodes.
- [Utilities](https://docs.imagine.art/workflows/utilities.md)
